mapper.select: SELECT /* /prepia/rateList : McpPrepiaMapper.selectRateList */ RATE.RATE_CD , RATE.RATE_NM , RATE.PAY_CL_CD , RATE.DATA_TYPE , RATE.FREE_CALL_CNT , RATE.NW_IN_CALL_CNT , RATE.NW_OUT_CALL_CNT , RATE.FREE_SMS_CNT , RATE.FREE_DATA_CNT , '' AS RATEDESC , '' AS KTRATENAME , '' AS KTRATECODE , '' AS AGREEMENT , NVL(DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT , BASE_AMT , (BASE_AMT*0.1) VAT , NVL(SPEC.AGRM_TRM, 0) AGRM_TRM , CD.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 , CD.EXPNSN_STR_VAL2 , CD.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 , #{orgnId} AS ORGN_ID , #{onOffType} AS ON_OFF_TYPE , #{operType} AS OPER_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST RATE , MSP_RATE_SPEC SPEC , NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP CD WHERE 1=1 AND RATE.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND RATE.DATA_TYPE = #{prdtSctnCd} --'LTE' 5G적용 AND RATE.RATE_CD = SPEC.RATE_CD(+) AND SPEC.AGRM_TRM(+) = '0' AND SPEC.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231235959' AND CD.USE_YN = 'Y' AND CD.CD_GROUP_ID =#{code} AND RATE.RATE_CD =CD.DTL_CD ORDER BY CD.INDC_ODRG
